questions.text: Which statement best reflects the central argument of the passage?
options: The passage presents reading as an analytical and contextual act
The passage argues that literature has no social connection
The passage focuses only on grammar and vocabulary

questions.text: What does the passage suggest about evidence-based reasoning?
options: It is unnecessary in academic writing
It depends only on personal opinion
It requires claims to be supported by textual or contextual evidence
It avoids engagement with the reading material
